seed_instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances.
new_constraint: Write all text in sentence case.
instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances. Write all text in lowercase. Write all text in sentence case.
response:
day 1: start your journey in san francisco, california. explore the golden gate bridge and fishermans wharf. drive 350 miles to los angeles.

day 2: spend the day in los angeles visiting the hollywood sign and griffith observatory. in the evening, drive 280 miles to las vegas, nevada.

day 3: wake up in las vegas and visit the grand canyon national park. drive 220 miles to page, arizona, to see antelope canyon.

day 4: explore the red rocks near page and drive 260 miles to moab, utah. hike in arches national park.

day 5: visit canyonlands national park in the morning. drive 300 miles to salt lake city, utah, for lunch and sightseeing.

day 6: drive 400 miles to seattle, washington. spend the afternoon at the space needle and pike place market.

day 7: finish your trip in portland, oregon, by visiting the powell butte park and the japanese garden. drive 170 miles from seattle to portland.
